title: Entry March
cue: After the Tyler knocks once and the door is opened
lyrics: The Grand Team outside need to be able to hear the first note of this, so wait accordingly.
Stop this as the IM salutes.  Start it again after he salutes.  Stop it as he gets to the East.

title: Be Seated
cue: After the Proclaiming Officer says - Be Seated, Brethren.
lyrics: Keep an eye on the Proclaiming Officer.  If he sits, end the tune.  If he comes out to do Grand Honors, end it before he needs to talk

title: Collar Collect
cue: After the Grand Deacons stand up
lyrics: The Proclaiming Officer will have just retiring officers to remove their collars

title: Get the Master Elect
lyrics: This happens as soon as the Installed Board is opened

title: Chaplain. SMIB
cue: Start it as he says - holy name
lyrics: This is the end of the prayer by the Grand Officer in the Chaplain position

title: Before Thy Altar Kneel
cue: After the ME kneels and the Installing Master knocks

title: Seal the VSL
cue: After the Installing Master says - Three Times
lyrics: Keep thy tongue from evil, etc.

title: H.S.
cue: After the Proclaiming Officer addresses the WBros in the middle
lyrics: This track gets loud, so keep an eye on it.

title: East Proclaim
file: audio/Installation/56 god bless our master true.mp3
cue: After everyone has sat after the proclamation

title: West Proclaim
cue: After everyone has sat after the proclamation

title: South Proclaim
file: audio/Installation/58 great architect divine with song.mp3
cue: After everyone has sat after the proclamation

title: Support to the Master
cue: After the Proclaiming officer has finished presenting the 1st WTs, Warrant, etc and is moving away.

title: Support to the SW
file: audio/Installation/59.2 support to the Warden SW.mp3
cue: After the Sword finishes addressing the SW and is moving to the saluting base

title: Support to the JW
file: audio/Installation/59.3 support to the Warden JW.mp3
cue: After the Sword finishes addressing the JW and is moving West

title: Address to Master. SMIB
cue: When the SW finishes the Address to the Master

title: Address to Brethren. SMIB
cue: When the IM finishes the Address to the Brethren

title: Exit - Onward Brother Masons
cue: After the IM has saluted the WM
